description_long: This is a round, medium-sized orange fruit with a slightly dimpled, textured peel and a warm orange hue. The surface displays natural imperfections and subtle color variations, with a small sticker label visible on one side, indicating it is store-bought. The top and bottom of the fruit show the typical navel and stem scars, characteristic of an orange. The peel appears thick and slightly glossy, with a matte finish in some areas due to the natural waxy coating. The fruit is solid and dense, suggesting a juicy interior composed of segmented flesh. This orange would commonly be found in urban environments such as markets, grocery stores, or as litter on sidewalks and parks.
description: A round, dimpled orange fruit with a natural peel and a small store label, showing typical navel and stem scars. The surface is slightly glossy with subtle color variations.
description_view_0: This view shows the orange with a visible sticker label on the left side and a slightly flattened top.
description_view_1: This view highlights the navel scar at the top center, with no visible label and a more uniform surface.
description_view_2: This view presents a smooth, uninterrupted orange peel with subtle dimpling and no visible label or scars.
description_view_3: This view shows the sticker label on the right side and a slightly indented top, with the peel's texture clearly visible.
attribute_location_or_placement: grocery store shelf, fruit stand, kitchen counter, park bench
